data.title: Rhonda Shear's Up All Night revival returns on Kings of Horror Tampa Bay is announced after 27 years.
data.description: This Halloween, Kings of Horror in Tampa Bay, Florida on October 2, 2025 announces the revival of Up All Night, a popular late-night movie showcase hosted by Rhonda Shear that aired on USA Network from 1989 to 1998. After a long hiatus, the show is making a comeback through a partnership, bringing back nostalgia and excitement to fans.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation trades $4.5 million ETH for stablecoins in second recent treasury adjustment.
data.description: The organization managing the world's second-largest blockchain has recently converted $4.5 million worth of ETH into stablecoins. This transaction represents its second significant treasury maneuver in recent months.

data.title: Clearmind Biomedical partners with Sutter Medical to distribute Neuroblade System at CNS, expanding access to minimally invasive brain surgery.
data.description: In a recent development, Clearmind Biomedical has formed a partnership to provide greater accessibility to a cutting-edge minimally invasive solution designed for the surgical evacuation of intracerebral hemorrhage. The company, based in San Jose, California, made the announcement on October 3, 2025. This partnership signifies a significant step forward in the field of neurosurgical innovation.

data.title: Coinbase pursues National Trust Charter, aiming to bridge the gap between crypto and traditional finance without becoming a bank.
data.description: Coinbase is reportedly pursuing a license as part of its overarching goal to connect the worlds of cryptocurrency and traditional finance.

data.title: All Y'alls Foods expands to Europe with Jerky Y'all on Amazon in 10 markets. High-protein snacks rooted in Texas.
data.description: Residents of Europe are now able to enjoy snacks rich in protein and fiber, inspired by the flavors of Texas and made with a focus on sustainability. All Y'alls Foods, a company hailing from Texas and known for being a trailblazer in plant-based protein products with robust tastes and a commitment to compassion, disclosed on October 3, 2025, that...

data.title: Skeena Resources Limited files C$125 million bought deal financing prospectus supplement, available on SEDAR.
data.description: The Base Shelf Prospectus and the Prospectus Supplement can be found on SEDAR. This disclosure can be accessed by the public for reviewing important information related to the company's financial prospectus.

data.title: Energy Fuels closes US$700M Convertible Senior Notes offering with additional notes purchased.
data.description: Energy Fuels Inc. (NYSE: UUUU) (TSX: EFR) disclosed on Oct. 3, 2025, the successful completion of an increased offering of 0.75% Convertible Senior Notes due 2031. The company confirmed the closing of the upsized offering, with the Notes valued at an aggregate principal amount of US$700.0 million.

data.title: SACH Pte. Ltd. merges with Quantumsphere Acquisition Corporation to list on NASDAQ; creates new entity.
data.description: The merger of two companies is anticipated to result in the newly combined company being listed on the NASDAQ Global Market. This move is expected to enhance the visibility and market presence of the merged entity. The NASDAQ Global Market is a prominent stock exchange that features over 2,500 listings and boasts a total market capitalization exceeding $10 trillion. Trading on this platform offers companies exposure to a broad investor base and increased liquidity for their shares. The decision to list on the NASDAQ Global Market underscores the combined company's ambition for growth and success in the competitive marketplace.

data.title: Texas aviation startup AirProtect receives backing from SouthernPlex Group to revolutionize aircraft care services. Filing for AirProtect Group, Inc. announced on Oct. 3, 2025.
data.description: SouthernPlex Group has pledged support to AirProtect, LLC to enhance private aircraft care through asset protection services. The announcement was made in Fort Worth, Texas, on October 3, 2025. SouthernPlex has filed for AirProtect Group, Inc. to aid in revolutionizing the aircraft industry. This backing is expected to bring about significant changes in the sector, with key figures including investment amounts yet to be disclosed.

data.title: Fluence leads industry discussion on cannabis cultivation & technology at PhotoX 2025 event bringing global experts together.
data.description: Austin, Texas, and Eindhoven, Netherlands - Fluence hosts PhotoX 2025, gathering global experts to discuss the future of cannabis cultivation and technology.

data.title: Cryptocurrency market cap surpasses $4.21T, Bitcoin hits $124,000 with US demand, Fed policy changes boosting Q4 investor optimism.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin surged to nearly $124,000 driven by increasing demand in the US, changes in Federal Reserve policy, and positive expectations for a strong fourth quarter. Investors were buoyed by these factors, leading to a significant rally in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: AI-driven Credo Tech tops 10 stocks on IBD's best lists; includes IBD 50, IPO Leaders with growth potential.
data.description: Discover which high-performing stocks such as Credo Technology have recently secured a place in Investor's Business Daily's compilation of top growth stocks. data.title: The Treasury plans to create a commemorative $1 coin featuring Trump.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.8%, marking a decrease of 0.3% from the previous month. This change represents a total of 500,000 new jobs added to the economy. Additionally, the GDP growth rate for the quarter has been revised to 6.2%, which is a significant increase from the previous estimate. These positive indicators suggest a strengthening of the economy and job market in the current scenario.
